reviews.text: I’ve been really impressed with this company and the way they support their customers. I never hesitate to pop in to search for what I’m looking for, and ask questions. Excited to see where they go and build from here!

reviews.author: Tammy Kuxhouse
reviews.text: WOW, cool dispensary. Rebeccca was very upbeat and helpful. My purchase was delicious with the desired results. I'll be back.

details.address: 2465 US-2, Crystal Falls, MI 49920, USA

reviews.author: Ronald
reviews.text: High quality products at the best price around by far!  Always amazing , fast, friendly customer service! It is definitely worth the short drive to Galzed and Confused! Ryan N helped me today, he brought it to my attention I had points for free products and was extremely friendly!!! We need more customer service like that around town! Great job Glazed and Confused team, keep it up!!!! :)

reviews.author: D B
reviews.text: Love this place. Super nice people! I've had a great experience every time I've been here. Nice selection of things, but I usually pre-order just in case it's a hot item. And if you like camping/hiking, there are lots of beautiful places around here to visit.

reviews.author: Alan Gann
reviews.text: Great products and GREAT CUSTOMER SERVICE FROM PICKUP STAFF! RECOMMEND THEM TO ALL!

reviews.author: Elizabeth Moczarny
reviews.text: Awesome customer service, super friendly staff. We had an issue with an order and they went above and beyond to fix it. Definitely one of our favorite places.

reviews.author: Skuffel
reviews.text:
I just moved here and have no experience with cannabis shops.
But I wanted something to help me sleep and this cute place is on my way to my friends house.
It wasn't very busy and I liked the "personal" service I got with suggesting a product for me to try.
I'll definitely be going back, probably become a regular customer.🙃

details.address: 1285 US-2, Crystal Falls, MI 49920, USA

reviews.author: Jason Durocher
reviews.text: DCC is a magic oasis that sits right there off the highway as you're cruising past Crystal Falls and what a pleasure it is to visit! I have come to visit several times for their deals, as they are always competitive (it's in their name, after all!!!). Max is usually the one you'll see there and WOW he does it all there: manager, budtender, and marketer, all while making you feel right at home. You'll never leave this place without feeling smarter and more confident about your choices!

reviews.author: Anna M
reviews.text: Deals is one of the most friendly atmosphere I've been to. Maxwell is someone who isn't just the manager. He makes it where it's a awesome experience every time. He makes it where you feel like you are part of the Deals family. The prices are one of the cheapest, great BOGO or 4 For 20. If there is something that isn't available, tell Maxwell and he orders it right away.

reviews.author: Liz Rich
reviews.text: Total disappointment. Me and my husband bought flower and what we got here was low quality, dry and not worth the money. I tried to support local, but this place completely failed. Definitely not coming back.

reviews.author: Sherri
reviews.text: Max is the best. I’ve been smoking for a very long time and have visited many places, I have never gotten such good customer service. Max went above and beyond. Great service, selection and price

reviews.author: Turtle bello
reviews.text: Max for one is incredible, so helpful and crazy understanding and cool. now as for the shop itself?? I mean what else could you ask for?? killer hours, INSANE PRICES, unbeatable deals with top quality products!! don't miss out everyone!!

reviews.author: Rachel Hagenbaugh
reviews.text:
Great Location!
Great People!
Great Deals!

Superior Buds Dispensary is a GREAT place to stop by and pick up all the essentials. The staff is super friendly and very knowledgeable. They are usually well stocked with many different types, kinds and products. There's new stuff dropping every week. Definitely need to check it out! If you are a patient in the area, you are gonna love it. Super clean and efficient... they even take debit cards now! Everything is always fresh and tasty HIGHLY recommen

reviews.author: Joshua Tipton
reviews.text: Amazing that these guys represent more than a couple dozen small brands. They really care about their patients!

reviews.author: Jackie Mac
reviews.text: Superior Buds has been my favorite place in town for almost two years. Knowledgeable and friendly staff. Always a good selection and prices for all budgets. Loving the new decor. 10 out of 10!

reviews.author: Mikey L
reviews.text: Got a chance to meet the owner for the first time . All around great and humble guy . Very friendly establishment and most importantly great deals and smells lovely inside ! Would definitely recommend 10/10

reviews.author: amanda kay
reviews.text: Great atmosphere. The staff is well educated and make it easy to get what you're looking for! I like that they've got the 10 pk pre-rolls in a tight sealed box. The variety of choices you get to choose from is great! The Best part... You can do an online order and they'll hold it for you so you can have guaranteed product waiting!!!

details.address: 401 B Mowat Ave, Fort Frances, ON P9A 1Y8, Canada

reviews.author: Jolene Stahn
reviews.text:
This shop is very clean and has a variety of products! Everything you could want and need!

Staff are super nice and chill. It was easy to use the iPads and the staff were able to answer any questions I had!

I appreciate that this shop is locally owned and operated.

Inside the store there’s tons of space to browse, everything is well organized, and well stocked. The wooden counter is a nice touch, great branding!

Highly recommend!

reviews.author: Mike Schnekenburger
reviews.text: Borderland Cannabis is a fantastic store and has a huge product offering. The staff are helpful, personable, and know what they are selling. Great location in town for the local residents and people coming into Canada. Check out their online store for a full product list with the option to checkout and pickup.

reviews.author: bethany whiffin
reviews.text: Friendly... helpfully... Definitely using this business again. 💯 recommend 👌

reviews.author: A K
reviews.text: Pretty amazing customer service except one guy there is ALWAYS rude to me ( AND I SPEND OVER HALF A THOUSAND A MONTH THERE) and acts like hes better then everyone else, if u dont like customer service go work in a cotton field or the mines or an oil rig.

reviews.author: Eden Arnold
reviews.text: Prices are a little steeper than I’m used to, but the bud is good quality and they carry a big variety of brands and quantities as well as many different variations of THC
